mapper.select: WITH user_instance AS (SELECT id, name, modpack_info_id, update_time FROM instance WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0), snapshot_ranked AS (SELECT s.id, s.instance_id, s.mc_version, s.loader_type, s.loader_version, s.java_version, s.load_ms, s.snapshot_time, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY s.instance_id ORDER BY s.snapshot_time DESC, s.id DESC ) AS rn FROM snapshot s JOIN user_instance ui ON ui.id = s.instance_id), latest_snapshot AS (SELECT id, instance_id, mc_version, loader_type, loader_version, java_version, load_ms, snapshot_time FROM snapshot_ranked WHERE rn = 1), prev_snapshot AS (SELECT id, instance_id FROM snapshot_ranked WHERE rn = 2), latest_mods AS (SELECT ls.instance_id, ms.mod_info_id, ms.version, ms.mod_hash FROM latest_snapshot ls JOIN mod_snapshot ms ON ms.snapshot_id = ls.id WHERE ms.is_delete = 0 OR ms.is_delete IS NULL OR ms.is_delete = 2), prev_mods AS (SELECT ps.instance_id, ms.mod_info_id, ms.version, ms.mod_hash FROM prev_snapshot ps JOIN mod_snapshot ms ON ms.snapshot_id = ps.id WHERE ms.is_delete = 0 OR ms.is_delete IS NULL OR ms.is_delete = 2), mark_ranked AS (SELECT target_id, favorite, note, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY target_id ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC ) AS rn FROM block_snap_system.sys_user_mark WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_type = 1), latest_mark AS (SELECT target_id, favorite, note FROM mark_ranked WHERE rn = 1), mod_count AS (SELECT instance_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM latest_mods GROUP BY instance_id), new_version AS (SELECT lm.instance_id, MAX(CASE WHEN mi.version IS NOT NULL AND lm.version IS NOT NULL AND mi.version <> lm.version THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS flag FROM latest_mods lm JOIN mod_info mi ON mi.id = lm.mod_info_id GROUP BY lm.instance_id), added_modified AS (SELECT l.instance_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM latest_mods l JOIN prev_snapshot ps ON ps.instance_id = l.instance_id LEFT JOIN prev_mods p ON p.instance_id = l.instance_id AND p.mod_info_id = l.mod_info_id WHERE p.mod_info_id IS NULL OR NOT (l.version <=> p.version) OR NOT (l.mod_hash <=> p.mod_hash) GROUP BY l.instance_id), removed AS (SELECT p.instance_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM prev_mods p LEFT JOIN latest_mods l ON l.instance_id = p.instance_id AND l.mod_info_id = p.mod_info_id WHERE l.mod_info_id IS NULL GROUP BY p.instance_id) SELECT ui.id, ui.name, IFNULL(lm.favorite, 0) AS favorite, lm.note, ls.mc_version, IFNULL(nv.flag, 0) AS is_new_version, ls.loader_type, ls.loader_version, ls.java_version, ls.load_ms AS total_load_ms, (IFNULL(am.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(rm.cnt, 0)) AS update_count, IFNULL(mc.cnt, 0) AS mod_count, 0 AS resource_count, 0 AS shader_count, mp.name AS modpack_name, mp.version AS modpack_version, mp.platform AS modpack_platform, ls.snapshot_time AS last_launch FROM user_instance ui LEFT JOIN latest_snapshot ls ON ls.instance_id = ui.id LEFT JOIN latest_mark lm ON lm.target_id = ui.id LEFT JOIN modpack_info mp ON mp.id = ui.modpack_info_id LEFT JOIN mod_count mc ON mc.instance_id = ui.id LEFT JOIN new_version nv ON nv.instance_id = ui.id LEFT JOIN added_modified am ON am.instance_id = ui.id LEFT JOIN removed rm ON rm.instance_id = ui.id ORDER BY ui.update_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO block_snap_system.sys_user_mark
user_id, target_id, target_type, favorite, note,
#{userId}, #{instanceId}, #{targetType}, #{favorite}, #{note},
